{{CargoRelic
|name=Monroe's Pencil
|class_id=22019
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=02-05
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Feb 5, 1812 AD, William Monroe made the first pencil in the world.<br>By inlaying a piece of graphite in the groove bar of wood, an American carpenter named William Monroe made the first wood pencil in the world. Moreover, he also invented the pencil-making machine that was able to cut the wood into slats and create a groove for the lead. This pencil-making technique lasted for more than two hundred years.
|fame=45
|art=25
|fth=22
|civ=30
|tech=32
|ss1=Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail ATK +1<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss2=Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail ATK +2<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss3=Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss4=Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail ATK +5<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000
|ss7=Per 100k Relic Points gained, Snail ATK +5<br>Relic Points: 5000000/5000000<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill I.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, INTEL gained +1%
}}
